{{Infobox character
| name = Jakson
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jakson]] has recently joined the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jakson]] was born and raised in [[Rainworth]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jakson]]'s uncle is a fisherman who visits the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
